task: Find a store near zip 30010 that provides authorized Apple services for imacs and make this one my store.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task. Evidence shows it searched stores near ZIP 30010, filtered by the service 'Apple Authorized Service Provider,' and identified Northlake as a qualifying nearby store. The store locator results showed Northlake at 4135 Lavista Rd, Tucker, GA 30084 with Apple Authorized Service Provider available. The agent also verified on Best Buy’s Apple repair page that Mac repair includes iMac. Finally, it clicked 'Make This Your Store' for Northlake, and the page updated the header from 'Your Store: San Francisco (13th and Harrison St.)' to 'Your Store: Northlake,' confirming the store was set.
final_result_response: Done. I set **Best Buy Northlake** at **4135 Lavista Rd, Tucker, GA 30084** as your store. I also confirmed it offers **Apple Authorized Service Provider** service, and Best Buy’s Apple repair page includes **iMac** under Mac repairs.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Searching for another store: await page.locator('e373').click();
Searching stores near zip 30010: await page.locator('e24').fill('30010');
Searching stores near zip 30010: await page.locator('e25').click();
Filtering for Apple Authorized Service Provider: await page.locator('e230').click();
Opening Northlake store details: await page.locator('e234').click();
Checking Apple service provider info: await page.locator('e59').click();
Filtering to Northlake Apple service result: await page.locator('e26').fill('30010');
Filtering to Northlake Apple service result: await page.locator('e27').click();
Setting Northlake as my store: await page.locator('e148').click();
